commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a30373e5041e77a5293f0d630e5ad1d3fe437f6a)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a shared channel draft streaming chunking resolver exported from `plugin-sdk/channel-outbound`, rewires Discord and Telegram wrappers to use it, updates outbound SDK docs/tests, and adjusts Slack session fixture tests.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +10, Docs 0. Total +15 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking SDK baseline finding from source inspection: the PR adds two public `channel-outbound` exports while the tracked baseline hash remains unchanged, and the checker compares rendered public SDK exports to that hash. I did not run the checker because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is the right lane because this maintainer-labeled PR changes a public Plugin SDK contract and is dirty against current main; automation should not choose the permanent API direction.

target.title: Share channel draft chunking resolver
target.body:
Summary:
- Move duplicated Discord/Telegram draft chunk sizing into one `channel-outbound` SDK helper.
- Keep channel wrappers as platform-cap shims and move shared behavior coverage to the SDK helper.
- Seed Slack prepare tests with canonical `SessionEntry` rows so the extension test graph catches store-shape regressions.

Proof:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/channel-outbound.draft-chunking.test.ts extensions/discord/src/draft-chunking.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot.helpers.test.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/message-handler/prepare.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_LOCAL_CHECK_MODE=throttled node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test-shared-draft-chunking.tsbuildinfo`
- `node --max-old-space-size=8192 --import tsx scripts/generate-plugin-sdk-api-baseline.ts --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/plugins/sdk-channel-outbound.md extensions/discord/src/draft-chunking.test.ts extensions/discord/src/draft-chunking.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot.helpers.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/draft-chunking.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/message-handler/prepare.test.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/message-handler/prepare.test-helpers.ts src/channels/draft-streaming-chunking.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-outbound.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-outbound.draft-chunking.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
- Telegram bot-to-bot mock-SUT smoke: driver message `29591`, SUT threaded reply `29592`, mock OpenAI requests `1`.
target.author: obviyus
